rationale: Educ. Code §33.056 addresses liability immunity for nonperformance under its subchapter. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: A person is not liable in any suit for damages for negligent performance or nonperformance of any requirement of this subchapter.
_note: Rule text is from an unrelated education statute; no interaction with the proposed homestead exemption change.
